name: Sprunki 3D Shooter
description: Sprunki 3D Shooter delivers nonstop action as you take on endless waves of Sprunkies! Your mission is clear: shoot to survive and outlast the chaos. Running low on ammo? Search the battlefield for scattered rounds to keep the fight alive. Gear up and face the ultimate challenge&mdash;how long can you hold your ground against the Sprunkies? Play this exciting shooting game made by video-igrice.com!
instructions: WASD Move Left Mouse Click Shoot
tags: Boys, First Person Shooter, Gun, Shoot 'Em Up, Shooting, Skill, Sprunki, weapons
